title: Design a Pricing Plans Layout Page
description: A three-tier pricing layout built with flexbox. Each card uses display: flex with flex-direction: column and justify-content: space-between to push content to the top and bottom. The order property controls visual sequence independently of HTML order, and flex-grow: 2 on the Pro plan makes it wider than the others.
objectives: Use display: flex on a container with flex-wrap: wrap for a responsive row
Use flex-direction: column on cards to stack content vertically
Use justify-content: space-between to push card content to top and bottom
Use the order property to control visual card sequence
Use flex-grow to make the Pro card wider than Basic and Premium
